metadata.description: A GPU / accelerator component. device_class covers a physical GPU, a whole-GPU passthrough (VFIO) to a guest, or a vGPU/MIG partition carved from a physical GPU (parent_device references the physical Hardware.GraphicsProcessor). Mirrors Redfish Processor (ProcessorType=GPU) / PCIeDevice. outputs-exempt: opaque inventory component — its attributes are Discovered-state facts on the containing host; it publishes no realize-time binding surface (rule 36(b) documented exclusion).

context.purpose: Inventories a GPU or accelerator — physical card, whole-GPU passthrough, or a vGPU/MIG partition — as a component of its host or guest.
context.plain_description: One GPU as a component record. The same type covers three shapes, distinguished by device_class: the physical card installed in a host, a whole card passed through to a guest, and a partition (a vGPU or MIG slice) carved from a physical card — a partition points at its parent physical device. Attributes (model, memory, architecture) are discovered facts; the type publishes no runtime binding surface because nothing binds to a GPU record directly — schedulers bind through the host or guest.
use_when: You need GPU inventory across hosts — which cards, where, with what memory and architecture.
You need the passthrough/partition chain (guest slice → physical card → host) traversable for maintenance impact.
not_for: Requesting GPU capacity for a workload — that is placement against advertised capability (e.g. Platform.NodePool capabilities), not a GPU component record.
works_with: Compute.BareMetalHost — the host the physical card is installed in.
Compute.VirtualMachine — the guest a passthrough or partition is presented to.
Hardware.GraphicsProcessor — parent_device: the physical card a partition is carved from.

device_class.description: Device realization (common-elements.md §7). passthrough = whole GPU to a guest; partition = vGPU/MIG slice (set parent_device + partition_mechanism).

partition_mechanism.description: Only when device_class=partition: e.g. mediated (NVIDIA vGPU / Linux mdev), mig, sr-iov.

location.description: PCIe slot / BDF within the parent (Redfish PhysicalLocation). Primary discriminator; for a partition, the vGPU/MIG instance id.

model.description: GPU model, e.g. AMD Radeon Pro W7900 (Redfish Model).

role.description: Semantic usage, e.g. compute | display | inference.

size.description: Framebuffer / device memory, e.g. 48GB (for a vGPU, the profile's allocation).

architecture.description: GPU architecture / generation, e.g. RDNA4, Hopper.

relationships.name: host
relationships.description: The host the physical GPU is installed in.

relationships.name: guest
relationships.description: For passthrough / partition (vGPU), the guest the device is presented to.

relationships.name: parent_device
relationships.description: parent_device — the physical GPU this passthrough/partition (vGPU/MIG) is derived from. REQUIRED when device_class is passthrough or partition (common-elements §7).
